steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The task requires emphasizing the NUMBER of SNOTEL sites in Wyoming. The notes provide the critical data: “around 90 sites throughout Wyoming.” The correct answer will feature this quantity directly.

steps.title: Match the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A opens with “there are around 90 SNOTEL sites” and uses “In Wyoming alone” to emphasize the state-specific quantity.

Choices B, C, and D either spotlight a single site, describe what the sites measure, or mention sites without emphasizing their number.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
